basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) has officially announced the Project Associate Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. Eligible candidates holding a B.Tech degree, Post Graduate qualification, or a Graduate degree with 3 years of relevant experience can submit their applications through email on or before 25 July 2026. Candidates should refer to the official notification for age limit details. Direct links to download the official notification and application details are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech, Post Graduate, Graduate + 3 Years relevant Experience
qualification.details: Project Associate: B.Tech OR Post Graduate OR Graduate + 3 Years relevant Experience

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Project Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_kanpur_ii: B.Tech, Post Graduate, Graduate + 3 Years relevant Experience

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Project Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Kanpur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Kanpur Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Associate: B.Tech OR Post Graduate OR Graduate + 3 Years relevant Experience

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Project Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Kanpur Project Associate Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the Project Associate posts at IIT Kanpur is 25 July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Associate posts at IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Project Associate position under the IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 notification. Interested candidates should check the details.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for IIT Kanpur Project Associate Recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply for the IIT Kanpur Project Associate posts through email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the application is sent to the official email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Project Associate post at IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Project Associate position will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 21600 to Rs. 54000 per month, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications required for Project Associate?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech, Post Graduate degree, or a Graduate degree with 3 years of relevant experience to be eligible for the Project Associate post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for IIT Kanpur Project Associate Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the IIT Kanpur Project Associate Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Project Associate at IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate posts at IIT Kanpur will involve an Online Interview, which will be conducted via platforms like Zoom or Skype.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: The job location for the Project Associate position is Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, specifically at the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur campus.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for IIT Kanpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur, where candidates can find more information, is https://www.iitk.ac.in. All updates will be posted there.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is the Project Associate position at IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: The Project Associate position at IIT Kanpur is a Contract-based job. This offers an opportunity to work on specific projects within the institute for a defined period.
